name: Baked Stuffed Soft Shell Crabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and dry the crabs.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Lift up the back on each end of the crab and place 2 cheese wedges inside.
4. Dip into beaten egg, then coat with bread crumbs.
5. Place the crabs in a greased baking dish.
6. Pour tomato sauce over them.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Makes 6 servings. Serve with tartar sauce.
